calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Continued To Jun-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randy Schmidt for Gordon Harris (Petitioner).

Mr. Schmidt stated that the original will was submitted to Ms. Harris, that it was not found amongst her belongings and that there was no objection. In addition, he stated that an Attorney was exempt from registering as a Professional Fiduciary, that it was a small estate, that a Professional Fiduciary would charge a fee and hire an Attorney and that it was a benefit to the estate to have one fee charged. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The lost will was admitted.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
